boundary_binding.action_boundary: Exact current control record closes the requested subscription-change boundary
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current source records close boundary; no overblock on tone or urgency
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE resolved by current control record

final_answer: Allow. The current control record explicitly confirms the billing-owner role is current, exact, and tied to the requested subscription change, which closes the action boundary. Policy says execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact request boundary, and communication tone cannot override that.
